title: Staff Software Engineer
description: MarketX is Europe's largest B2B marketplace with £8B GMV. As a Staff Engineer, you'll work across our 80-engineer platform org, identifying and solving the hardest technical problems that span multiple teams. You'll combine deep technical execution with broad influence — writing code, reviewing architecture, and mentoring senior engineers.
responsibilities: Identify and resolve cross-cutting technical problems affecting 80+ engineers
Author RFCs and drive architectural alignment across 6 product teams
Contribute high-impact production code (30-40% of time)
Grow 3-4 senior engineers toward staff-level impact
